public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as ferry marshal.
appearance: Cold-ready layered gear, ward-conscious fastening, and containment-minded kit signal disciplined caution.
manner: Balances command voice with practiced observation, sounding like someone who expects trouble to hide inside normality. In Sheresh Communes, that reads as someone curious, controlled, and alert to magical contamination, speaking like someone used to careful containment, and the habits of a ferry marshal still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of ferry marshal in and around Sheresh Dome Road, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Protect their footing in Sheresh Dome Road while steering current strain away from a public rupture they may not survive politically or materially.
hidden_pressure: A private obligation, debt, promise, or fear tied to mutational drift is narrowing their options faster than they admit.

adventure_hooks.summary: Any task accepted from Sylvi Rimebridge may turn into an escort, checkpoint, or route-control problem before the destination is reached.
Sylvi Rimebridge needs outside hands to handle a breach, seizure, or violent disturbance before it spreads through Sheresh Dome Road.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V33_1 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Uniform, posture, and the way others make room mark Sylvi Rimebridge as visible enforcement before rank ever needs to be named.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Sheresh Dome Road: checkpoints, barracks, patrol seams, or visible trouble-spots
encounter_context.interaction_anchor: threshold control or rapid incident response

first_impression: Sylvi Rimebridge presents as Balances command voice with practiced observation, sounding like someone who expects trouble to hide inside normality. In Sheresh Communes, that reads as someone curious, controlled, and alert to magical contamination, speaking like someone used to careful containment, and the habits of a ferry marshal still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Ferry Marshal, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Sheresh Communes.
what_they_refuse: Sylvi Rimebridge refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Ferry Marshal too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Sylvi Rimebridge can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Sylvi Rimebridge adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Sylvi Rimebridge is Known locally through day-to-day work as ferry marshal. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Ferry Marshal.
social_texture: Sylvi Rimebridge speaks like someone who has spent too long translating private stakes into acceptable public language. Around Sheresh Dome Road, people read them as spell-literate, aesthetically alert, and wary of magical contamination.
money_pressure: Their material pressure is tied to reagents; even when wealthy, they think in terms of loss, leverage, and what one bad week would expose.
status_anxiety: What they fear most is not simple failure but mutational drift becoming socially visible before they can contain it.
long_memory: They remember who made their work harder, who preserved dignity under strain, and who tried to force speed without bearing consequence.
obvious_tell: When pressure rises, Sylvi touches clothing, tools, or insignia before answering, as if checking that their role is still intact.
best_use_case: Use Sylvi Rimebridge when the party needs a socially grounded face for Sheresh Dome Road: access, warning, delay, price, or reluctant help.
private_contradiction: They want to appear consistent, but their real choices are split between duty, self-protection, and preserving one relationship they cannot afford to lose.
